For one set of experiments at the 350 keV accelerator
Ti-N solid targets were used. The targets, 10 keV,
approximately, thick at 280 keV, were produced by
evaporating a thin layer of Ti onto a thick Ta
backing and nitriding the Ti layer in a nitrogen
atmosphere by resistance heating. In the experiments
at the 350 keV accelerator windowless gas target
systems of the extended type or of the quasi-point
supersonic Jet Type were used too. At the
energy > 0.4 MeV 14N ions were implanted in 0.1 mm
All energy values were taken from level structure shown
